meta.title: Foundterra | Venture-Led Fundraising Advisory & Preparation
meta.description: Stop guessing what investors want to see. Institutional-standard preparation for pre-Seed and Seed rounds led by an active Venture Associate. Master decks, math, and research.

hero.title: Your pitch deck is costing you meetings. Stop guessing what investors want to see.
hero.subtitle: Most founders get a "pass" because their materials don't meet the institutional standard. Foundterra is a boutique strategy agency led by an active Venture Associate. We provide the research, modeling, and design required to present your business the way VCs actually want to see it.

problem.title: Why Great Founders Get Passed Over
problem.subtitle: It's rarely the business idea. It's usually the communication.

items.title: The Narrative is Unclear
items.description: If an investor can't explain your business to their partner after skimming your deck, it's a pass. We restructure your flow for logic and clarity.

items.title: The Financials Are Unrealistic
items.description: Sloppy unit economics or assumptions that don't scale are red flags. We sanity-check your model to ensure it aligns with standard market benchmarks.

items.title: The Presentation Looks "Early"
items.description: Design signals competence. A cluttered deck can make execution look risky. We apply a professional, clean aesthetic suitable for institutional investors.

items.title: The "Why Now" is Missing
items.description: Investors need to understand the urgency. We help you highlight market signals and traction to show why this opportunity exists today.

about.title: For Founders Building an Investor-Ready Pitch Deck
about.subtitle: Foundterra acts as your strategic partner to prepare your materials for the raise.

qualifications.title: The Solo Founder
qualifications.description: You have the vision, but need a partner to organize it into a professional format.

qualifications.title: The Technical Team
qualifications.description: You have a strong product, but need help translating features into a business case.

qualifications.title: The Pre-Seed Founder
qualifications.description: You are preparing to raise and need to ensure your materials meet industry standards before you start outreach.

packages.title: Complete Fundraising Packages for Founders. Raise with Confidence!
packages.subtitle: We build your materials using the same logic and scrutiny found in institutional venture firms. Every project starts with a 20-Slide Master Repository designed to answer the questions VCs actually ask.

plans.name: The Narrative Blueprint
plans.description: For founders with data who need an institutional-grade story and design.

plans.name: The Funding Standard
plans.description: The complete kit for founders who need to prove their market and financials.

plans.name: The Venture Partner
plans.description: Our recommended tier for Seed rounds. Proving your market and financials.

items.title: Review Service
items.description: For founders who want a professional opinion before emailing investors. We review your deck and provide a detailed video critique and written action list.

items.title: Waitlist and Landing Page
items.description: Ensure you have a professional digital presence. We build a clean, responsive landing page designed to capture emails and track visitor interest.

services.title: Incorporation Support
services.details: Our partners help coordinate your Delaware C-Corp setup, standard founder agreements, and tax compliance so your administrative house is in order.

services.title: Investor Introductions
services.details: We facilitate warm introductions to our investor network—but only when the fit is right. We also provide pitch coaching to ensure you are ready for the meeting.

steps.title: Free 30-Min Consultation
steps.description: We discuss your current stage and identify which package aligns with your needs.

steps.title: Kickoff
steps.description: You share your existing materials, data, and notes. We handle the organization.

steps.title: Drafting & Design
steps.description: We build the narrative structure, financial models, and visual design.

steps.title: Review & Refine
steps.description: You receive the drafts. We iterate based on your feedback to ensure accuracy.

steps.title: Final Delivery
steps.description: You receive editable files and ready-to-share PDFs.

steps.title: You Are Ready to Raise!
steps.description: Investors will be thrilled to see your deck! Send it to them!

investorPerspective.title: The Investor Perspective
investorPerspective.quote: I founded Foundterra to help founders communicate the value I know they have.
investorPerspective.name: Aleksandr Zlotnikov
investorPerspective.role: Senior Venture Scout at LvlUp Ventures • Venture Associate at GGW Ventures • Mentor at Founder Institute • Deal Partner at Boardy Ventures
investorPerspective.description: For the past year, I have hosted regular pitch sessions for early-stage founders. I actively review pitch decks for VC firms. I understand the criteria investors use to evaluate opportunities. My goal is to apply that perspective to your materials, ensuring you avoid common pitfalls and present your business in the best possible light.

form.privacy: We respect your privacy. No spam, just valuable resources.

success.title: Success!
success.description: Your resources are ready! Redirecting to your exclusive content...

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: Please try again or contact us at info@foundterra.com

questions.question: Do you take equity?
questions.answer: No. We work on a fixed-fee service basis.

questions.question: Who works on my deck?
questions.answer: Strategy and review are overseen by Aleksandr. Design and modeling are handled by our design and business analyst experts.

questions.question: Can you guarantee I will raise money?
questions.answer: No service can guarantee investment. We guarantee that your materials will be professional, logical, and aligned with industry standards.

questions.question: How fast is the turnaround?
questions.answer: Reviews take 48 hours. Full packages range from 4 days to 3 weeks, depending on the complexity and revision speed.

questions.question: Do you sign NDAs?
questions.answer: Yes. We are happy to sign an NDA to keep your data confidential.

finalCTA.title: Ready to Professionalize Your Pitch

finalCTA.alternativeText: No pitch. No pressure. Just actionable feedback.
